name: Squash Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the fresh squash in salted water until tender, then drain.
2. Mash the cooked squash.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except half the stuffing mix and 1 stick of butter.
- Add the mashed squash to the mixture.
- Stir in the piminto, onions, sour cream, cream of chicken soup, and grated carrots.
4. Mix half the stuffing mix with the butter.
5. Spread part of this butter-stuffing mixture on the bottom of a casserole dish.
6. Pour the squash mixture into the prepared dish.
7. Sprinkle the remaining butter-stuffing mixture over the top.
8. Cook at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until heated through and golden brown on top.
